# HPD.ML.LightGBM.TreeEnsembleScoringTransform

- Package: `HPD-ML-LightGBM` `0.5.0`
- Assembly: `HPD.ML.LightGBM`
- Namespace: `HPD.ML.LightGBM`
- Kind: `class`

Scores new data using a trained tree ensemble. All prediction happens in managed code — no native LightGBM dependency at inference time.

```csharp

```
